reasoning: Test Prep and Reading Comprehension requires extreme focus, authority, and clarity. A high-contrast, Swiss editorial design mimics traditional high-quality exam interfaces while remaining modern and distraction-free. The combination of classic serif typography for reading material and sterile sans/mono for the UI creates a highly authoritative 'Old Money Tech' aesthetic.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-tight font-medium font-serif
scale.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-medium font-serif
scale.body_reading: text-lg md:text-xl leading-loose text-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-200 font-serif
scale.small_label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium font-mono text-zinc-500

surface_strategies.reading_pane: Solid background, no shadow, subtle 1px border. Focus entirely on typography.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background matching surface color, 1px border (border-zinc-200 dark:border-zinc-800), no shadow. Dense and compact.
surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60, border-b border-zinc-200/50 dark:border-zinc-800/50.
surface_strategies.flashcards: Neumorphic tactile variants with sharp 1px border. Two-sided with Framer Motion flip.
surface_strategies.timer_widget: Grid Borders (Technical look). Exposed skeleton, mono typography.

components.buttons: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-sm). Primary uses #002FA7. text-white ALWAYS. High contrast hover states.
components.timer: Retro-Futurism style. Monospace font. Red (#FF2A00) when running out of time.
components.vocabulary_popover: Shadcn Popover. High contrast background (dark on light theme, light on dark theme) to instantly draw attention to the meaning.
components.article_settings: Sticky right sidebar or slide-out sheet (Shadcn Sheet). Dense, compact toggles and sliders.
components.data_display: Shadcn Charts and Progress bars. Use primary accent and monochrome scales.

motion.flashcard_flip: Framer motion 3D rotation on Y axis.
motion.reading_progress: Smooth width transition on sticky top progress bar.
motion.vocabulary_highlight: Subtle yellow or blue background tint transition on hover/click of difficult words.

hero_landing.description: Student intensely focused on reading in a dark library, serving as the landing page hero background image.

dashboard_background_accent.description: Abstract angled white lines on black background, used as subtle opacity mask for dashboard headers or dark mode backgrounds.

feature_reading_typography.description: Clean modern typography book layout, used in the landing page bento grid for the 'Quality Articles' feature.

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI for all forms, popovers, and dialogs. Strip away heavy shadows and rounded corners; default to 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none'.
The Reading Assessment interface must be pristine. Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for the article text, 'IBM Plex Sans' for questions and UI.
Implement the timer as a sticky, hideable element. Use monospace font for the digits.
For the Vocabulary builder, wrap complex words in a span with an onClick handler that triggers a Shadcn Popover containing the definition, example, and a 'Bookmark for Flashcard' button.
For dark mode, DO NOT use pure black backgrounds. Use the zinc scale (zinc-950 for background, zinc-900 for surface).
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., 'start-assessment-btn', 'timer-toggle', 'vocab-word-[word]').
The post-reading Q&A should feel like an integrated part of the flow, not a disruptive modal. Use a smooth scroll or slide-in.
